subject: Waiting on your git window
body: Pearly Drifting Jetty has completed the onboarding-flow handoff edits and validation, but I see your fresh git:index/head claim 503e5b8a for the context-cost plan commit window. I will not touch the index while your window is active. After it clears, I plan to commit only the onboarding README/prompt/Cursor-rule and related handoff/collaboration-state bundle unless owner direction changes.
